name: the-lords-of-easy-money
description: Christopher Leonard's The Lords of Easy Money — understand how the Federal Reserve's quantitative easing policies transformed the economy, created inequality, and set the stage for inflation
useCase: Helps anyone understand modern central banking — how QE works, who benefits, how it caused inflation, and what individuals can do to protect their finances.
knownRisks: Monetary policy is complex and evolving — the book covers Fed policy through 2022
